title: Ecosystem Focus Alignment
summary: Truth-aligned mapping of PrivateDAO into decentralisation, censorship resistance, DAO tooling, education, developer tooling, payments, and selective cause-driven fit.

focusAreas.title: Promote decentralisation
focusAreas.whatWorksNow: PrivateDAO already exposes wallet-connected governance, launch blockers, custody truth, authority hardening, and reviewer-safe trust surfaces instead of hiding operational trust in off-product workflows.
focusAreas.whyItMatters: This makes decentralisation inspectable as product behavior and operating discipline, not only protocol rhetoric.
focusAreas.exactGap: Production multisig closure and authority-transfer evidence still remain the real boundary before stronger decentralisation claims can be made for mainnet funds.

focusAreas.title: Make Solana more censorship resistant
focusAreas.whatWorksNow: PrivateDAO already ships commit-reveal governance, execution safety boundaries, hosted reads, runtime diagnostics, and reviewer-facing proof routes that strengthen governance resilience.
focusAreas.whyItMatters: These surfaces show how operational censorship boundaries are handled before a proposal reaches execution.
focusAreas.exactGap: The strongest censorship-resistance case still depends on completed custody evidence, monitored runtime ownership, and more externally proven infrastructure closure.

focusAreas.title: DAO tooling
focusAreas.whatWorksNow: The core live product already covers DAO creation, proposal lifecycle, private voting, treasury motion handling, trust packets, telemetry, and reviewer-safe surfaces.
focusAreas.whyItMatters: Coordination, communication, treasury routing, and proof are already productized into one Solana governance shell.
focusAreas.exactGap: The highest-value next step is to keep treasury professionalism and custody continuity extremely tight as the product advances toward mainnet operations.

focusAreas.title: Education
focusAreas.whatWorksNow: PrivateDAO already ships a hosted story route, community hub, start workspace, reviewer packets, and documents that onboard judges, users, and operators quickly.
focusAreas.whyItMatters: The product already teaches governance, proof, and launch discipline through live routes instead of isolated theory.
focusAreas.exactGap: Education will get stronger as video openings, onboarding copy, and public community materials stay perfectly synced with live proof and telemetry.

focusAreas.title: Developer tooling
focusAreas.whatWorksNow: PrivateDAO already provides reviewer telemetry, generated packets, hosted-read proof, runtime diagnostics, and a developer route tied to real product infrastructure.
focusAreas.whyItMatters: This turns the repository and product into a usable Solana infrastructure workflow instead of a raw code dump.
focusAreas.exactGap: The best uplift is continued strengthening of exported telemetry, runtime evidence summaries, and infrastructure-facing docs for external engineers.

focusAreas.title: Payments
focusAreas.whatWorksNow: Treasury request routing, confidential payout framing, payments-oriented intake flows, and reviewer-safe custody truth are already visible in the live product.
focusAreas.whyItMatters: This makes DAO treasury operations and business-facing payout flows concrete rather than conceptual.
focusAreas.exactGap: The strongest version still requires strict sender discipline, explorer-linked rails, and completed authority-transfer evidence for real-funds credibility.

focusAreas.title: Cause-driven building
focusAreas.whatWorksNow: PrivateDAO already supports grant governance, community treasury routing, and privacy-aware payout approval flows that can serve more inclusive coordination models.
focusAreas.whyItMatters: The product can support public-good and community-funding structures without exposing every intermediate decision publicly.
focusAreas.exactGap: This remains a selective fit until a cause-specific pilot, partner, or measurable impact program is actually documented.
